@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class IBasicStats {
    <<interface>>
    getMin(): double
    getMax(): double
    getSum(): double
    getMean(): double
}

class DataSeries {
    - label: String
    - data: double[]
    - count: int
    
    + DataSeries(label: String)
    + size(): int
    + add(val: double): void
    + getMin(): double
    + getMax(): double
    + getSum(): double
    + getMean(): double
    + toString(): String
}

IBasicStats <|.. DataSeries : implements

DataAnalysisCLI "1" *-- DataFrame 
DataFrame "1" *-- DataSeries 

@enduml
